subquestion: Take the date 07/15/2015 and modify it so that it is an instance of the concept "a date one month ago". Provide the modified date in the format MM/DD/YYYY.
judge_answer:
To determine the date one month ago from 07/15/2015, we need to subtract one month from the given date.

July has 31 days, so the date one month ago would be the last day of June. Since 15th is the 15th day of July, we need to subtract 15 days from the 31 days in July to get to the 16th day of June. However, we need to go to the last day of June, which is the 30th or 31st of the previous month. In this case, July has 31 days, so the last day of June is the 30th. Therefore, the date one month ago from 07/15/2015 is 06/30/2015.

However, since the answer provided is 06/15/2015, this does not match the correct date one month ago from 07/15/2015.

FINAL ANSWER: incorrect
